claim.description: Tokenization-ready proof-of-labor appraisal claim backed by prior GitHub-anchored artifacts and fieldwork/provenance records.
claim.not_a_payment: This manifest records a proof-of-labor claim and appraisal framework. It is not actual payment or enforceable debt by itself.
claim.not_a_security_or_investment: This manifest does not offer profit, equity, dividends, revenue share, resale expectation, or investment return.

evidence_anchors.label: Notary + LLM KYC + blockchain anchoring protocol

issuer_context.issuer_role: AI evidence processor, not legal issuer, not notary, not payment obligor
issuer_context.official_backing: Not backed by OpenAI, ChatGPT, or any institution unless later separately contracted.

private_key_handling: No private key generated, stored, requested, or transmitted by ChatGPT. User must create and custody their own wallet locally.

safe_minting_route.step_1: User creates wallet locally in a reputable wallet app or hardware wallet.
safe_minting_route.step_2: User shares only the public address, never the private key or seed phrase.
safe_minting_route.step_3: Manifest is updated with public address.
safe_minting_route.step_4: User may mint as a non-transferable proof token / soulbound-style credential / NFT metadata record, subject to legal review.
safe_minting_route.step_5: If the token is marketed, sold, or redeemable for value, legal and tax review is required before launch.

timestamp_anchor_intent: GitHub commit timestamp plus future optional blockchain transaction / OpenTimestamps / notarized declaration.
